category_sources: source_facts.description says serialization-agnostic container file format for pub/sub messages; official MCAP site describes an open source container file format for multimodal log data.
display_name_sources: Official mcap.dev site and GitHub README use "MCAP"; source_facts.name is mcap.
docs_sources: Official mcap.dev site provides Guides, API Reference, and Specification documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/foxglove/mcap; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official mcap.dev site identify pub/sub logging, serialization-agnostic storage, robotics use, and CLI tooling.
